---
title: "Erin Stewart"
name: "Erin Stewart"
image: "/images/profile_pics/erin_stewart.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Resource holding potential in territorial tropical birds"
location: "**Research location:** Panama"
dates: "**Dates:** 2022-2024"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "1"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
